notes: Adds easy select mode for shifting real stored log events earlier or later.
Adds safe block shifting that adjusts adjacent rows to preserve coverage and avoid deleting unselected events.
Marks signed/certified days as Needs Recertification after a shift.
Turns the duty-status graph line red from the exact HOS violation minute.
Keeps GPS auto-driving disabled and does not save synthetic timeline rows.
